name: Pernix's quiver
hoverSummary: Ammunition-slot quiver once belonging to Pernix. High-end ranged support item.
detailLines: A quiver that once belonged to Pernix, the only ranger to be given the rank of Praesul.
Current simulator simplification: represented as an ammo-slot item.
Useful future candidate for quiver and ammo-subslot support.
